title: Neco of undying
description: Make your boring, all-time-used totems a neco arc!
body:
> Are you bored with a simple 2D totem?\
> We have a solution!
## ***NEKO-ARC TOTEM!***

**YOU CHOOSE WHAT YOUR TOTEM SHOULD BE! AND YOU'VE CHOSEN THE *NECO!***

> Will save you from any trouble | burunyuu 

- Resource-pack includes: localization(RU, EN, UA), model and totem break sound.

> **Requires [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)**

Video preview: https://youtu.be/MceABKj4S2o

Chaos version: rename the totem to: `Chaos of undying`

![Banner](https://i.imgur.com/ZtNyIPZ.png)

*NYANYA!*
